calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-26-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: At the first calendar call, no counsel, parties, or other interested persons appeared. Subsequently, at the second calendar call, Jonathan Ferdon, counsel for the San Francisco Public Guardian, appeared.

At the first calendar call, the Court noted the absence of appearances and that the matter had been continued numerous times without apparent progress. As a result, the matter was taken off calendar.

Subsequent to the calendar call, Mr. Ferdon appeared and advised the Court of the Public Guardian's limited participation in this estate and the discovery that a safety deposit box in the care, custody,and control of Wells Fargo Bank was now missing. In the absence of other assets and inasmuch as the matter was now in the hands of Wells Fargo to locate the missing box, the Court reaffirmed its earlier decision to take the matter off calendar.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR #7782 ; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Continued To Dec-26-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Juanita Taylor appearing for her nephew Joseph Scott. He is not in Court because he is in Nevada trying to locate his father. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. Lloyd Crenna appearing only because attorney John Milano is in the hospital. Mr. Milano will not be able to represent Ms. Carpenter. Ms. Carpenter has been advising Brenda Scott. Brenda Scott has not file any petition for probate. Ms. Taylor agrees to put up the funds to open the safe deposit box. Matter is continued to 12/26. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Continued To Nov-15-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Court wants Mr. Ferdon to review the file.
After reviewing the file, Mr. Ferdon requests for continuance to contact the petitioner. Matter is continued to 11/15. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
